quotes.verbatim_quote: By starting the same rhythm on beat 2 “and” that was started on beat 1, you get a 5/4 mirror
quotes.why_load_bearing: Constructive rule for 5/4 mirror (hemioval) via displacement.

quotes.verbatim_quote: By starting the same rhythm on beat 3 “and” as beat 1, you get a 7/4 mirror rhythm.
